comparison_to_water_year_2026_review.this_artifact_scope: CBR event flow only over a longer multi-year window

forbidden_use: hiding water-simulation conservation failures with visuals or forcing
high-flow preset or feature-forcing tuning before peak/outlier review

high_flow_outlier_review.interpretation: Official CDEC CBR event-flow values at or above 20,000 cfs are retained as source evidence, but must be reviewed as flood/high-water context before any runnable high-flow presets, sticky holes, washout behavior, unsafe-flow visuals, feature forcing, or gameplay difficulty tuning use them.
high_flow_outlier_review.promotion_gate: Do not promote high-flow visual or gameplay variants from these peaks until A25 release/routing, station-to-rapid timing, hydrologic plausibility, legal/redistribution signoff, and guide/outfitter validation pass.

promotion_blockers: Official high-flow peak/outlier interpretation remains unresolved for CBR flood-event samples.
A25 release-routing interpretation remains unresolved for station-to-rapid timing.
CBR is a station context, not accepted rapid-scale hydraulics or guide-validated route behavior by itself.
Legal/redistribution signoff and guide/outfitter validation remain open before production use.
Feature forcing and lifelike water visuals must not use this context to hide water-simulation conservation failures.
promotion_gate: Use this multi-year CDEC CBR flow context for seasonal review and guide discussion only. Do not retune South Fork presets, feature forcing, hole stickiness, wave trains, wet banks, or lifelike water appearance until A25 release/routing interpretation, legal/redistribution signoff, hydrologic station-to-rapid relation, and guide/outfitter validation are complete.
purpose: Attach representative multi-year CDEC CBR event-flow context for South Fork seasonal-flow review without promoting gameplay presets or lifelike water visuals.

request_window.label: water_year_2022_through_partial_2026
request_window.note: CDEC event services returned a 2021-09-30 23:00 local first sample for the requested 2021-10-01 start; that row is retained in daily evidence but excluded from requested-window rollups.
